inputs.label: Cost of Attendance
inputs.businessContext: Total annual cost including tuition, fees, books, and living expenses.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total annual cost including tuition, fees, books, and living expenses.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Öğrenim ücreti, harçlar, kitaplar ve yaşam giderleri dahil toplam yıllık maliyet.
businessContext_i18n.de: Jährliche Gesamtkosten einschließlich Studiengebühren, Gebühren, Bücher und Lebenshaltungskosten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût annuel total incluant les frais de scolarité, les frais, les livres et les dépenses de subsistance.
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo anual total que incluye matrícula, cuotas, libros y gastos de manutención.
businessContext_i18n.ar: التكلفة السنوية الإجمالية شاملة الرسوم الدراسية والرسوم والكتب ونفقات المعيشة.

inputs.label: Annual Family Income
inputs.businessContext: Total adjusted gross income of the family.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total adjusted gross income of the family.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Revenu brut total ajusté de la famille.
businessContext_i18n.es: Ingreso bruto ajustado total de la familia.

inputs.label: Number of Dependents
inputs.businessContext: Number of family members financially dependent (including the student).

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of family members financially dependent (including the student).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Finansal olarak bağımlı aile üyesi sayısı (öğrenci dahil).
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der finanziell abhängigen Familienmitglieder (einschließlich des Studenten).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de membres de la famille financièrement à charge (y compris l'étudiant).
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de miembros de la familia financieramente dependientes (incluyendo al estudiante).
businessContext_i18n.ar: عدد أفراد الأسرة المعالين ماليًا (بما في ذلك الطالب).

inputs.label: Total Assets
inputs.businessContext: Total value of cash, savings, investments, and other assets.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total value of cash, savings, investments, and other assets.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Nakit, tasarruf, yatırım ve diğer varlıkların toplam değeri.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtwert von Bargeld, Ersparnissen, Investitionen und anderen Vermögenswerten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Valeur totale des liquidités, de l'épargne, des investissements et autres actifs.
businessContext_i18n.es: Valor total de efectivo, ahorros, inversiones y otros activos.
businessContext_i18n.ar: القيمة الإجمالية للنقد والمدخرات والاستثمارات والأصول الأخرى.

inputs.label: Other Financial Aid
inputs.businessContext: Other scholarships, grants, or aid already awarded.

businessContext_i18n.en: Other scholarships, grants, or aid already awarded.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Halihazırda verilmiş diğer burslar, hibeler veya yardımlar.
businessContext_i18n.de: Bereits erhaltene andere Stipendien, Zuschüsse oder Beihilfen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Autres bourses, subventions ou aides déjà attribuées.
businessContext_i18n.es: Otras becas, subvenciones o ayudas ya otorgadas.
businessContext_i18n.ar: المنح الدراسية أو المنح أو المساعدات الأخرى الممنوحة بالفعل.
